programme.desc: For a class project, Mandy has to showcase her clothing designs at a student fashion show. After the show, the Baxters are beaming with pride for Mandy's success, until she decides to quit school to sell some of her designs.

programme.title: The Middle: Back to School
programme.desc: After a disastrous attempt to get her kids ready for the first day of school, Frankie devises a plan to stay on top of her kids' schedules in order to better organize their lives.

programme.title: The Middle: Homecoming
programme.desc: Axl makes the varsity football team, much to Frankie's delight. As she looks forward to her life-long dream of dressing up and walking with Mike out on the field during homecoming, it turns out that Sue's first cross-country meet is the same day.

programme.title: The Middle: The Diaper Incident
programme.desc: Frankie is humiliated when a store clerk mistakenly assumes she's shopping for adult diapers when she's looking for baby diapers for Sue. Meanwhile, Frankie throws out her back and hides it from Mike.

programme.title: The Middle: The Quarry
programme.desc: When Axl is suspended for skipping school, Mike decides it's time to teach his son a lesson and makes him work with him at the quarry. Mike's plan backfires, however, when Axl likes the job so much that he wants to quit school.

programme.title: Reba: Money Blues
programme.desc: When Reba learns that Cheyenne must document all of her purchases, Reba advises Van to treat Cheyenne more as an equal, but Van decides to give Cheyenne an allowance instead. Meanwhile, Jake starts a lucrative business selling soda to his classmates.

programme.title: Reba: Reba the Landlord
programme.desc: In an effort to save Brock and Barbra Jean from losing their home, Reba and Van buy their house and rent it out to them. Not liking this arrangement, Barbra Jean decides to sue Reba after she sprains her ankle in the house.

programme.title: Reba: The Blonde Leading the Blind
programme.desc: When Reba undergoes laser eye surgery she is left temporarily blind and Barbra Jean insists on helping her until she gets her eyesight back.

programme.title: Reba: Here We Go Again

programme.title: The Office: The Meeting
programme.desc: Michael starts to feel insecure and defensive after a request from Jim. Dwight convinces Toby to look into Darryl's worker's comp claim. Pam tries to deal with the guest list of the wedding.

programme.title: The Office: The Promotion
programme.desc: David lets everyone know that not everyone will be getting a raise. Dwight finally hits his breaking point with Jim and looks around the office for support. Pam asks for cash instead of wedding gifts.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Everyone travels to Niagara Falls for Jim and Pam's wedding. The guys try to hook up while everyone tries to keep Pam's pregnancy a secret.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara

programme.title: The Office: Mafia

programme.title: The Office: Koi Pond

programme.title: The Office: Murder
programme.desc: Michael is troubled by rumours about Dunder Mifflin, and forces the office into a day of strange diversions. Andy figures out that the chief obstacle he has to overcome is his own awkwardness.

programme.title: The Office: Share Holders Meeting
programme.desc: When Michael learns he is going to be honoured at the Dunder Mifflin shareholder meeting in New York City, he brings Andy, Dwight and Oscar with him. Jim is left in charge of the office, and has a hard time getting Ryan to do any work.

programme.desc: As more information pours in about victims from the past, and how they tie to the murders of the present, Lt. Cooper and Amy Sykes get caught in an unexpected gun fight. Sharon finds leverage against Rev. Price, his attorney, and Mark Hickman.

programme.desc: The conclusion of Hindsight ties all the threads of seven murders together as the video wire on Rev. Price elicits admissions from his younger brother, narrowing the field of suspects to three. Mark Hickman finally confronts the truth about his past.

programme.desc: Para psychologists and psychics descend on the house to investigate what really happened that night in Amityville.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Arctic Disaster
programme.desc: Primitive skills expert and endurance athlete Matt is captured and dropped into chest-deep snow in the Arctic Circle. Wearing nothing but his buckskin shorts and sandals, he has to fight through a frozen swamp of snow to find his way back to civilization.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Army Veteran Tom is captured, hooded, handcuffed and dropped on a volcano in the wilderness of Chile. He'll need all his bushcraft skills to scale glaciers, conquer an impenetrable jungle and brave the desolation as he races to find civilization.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Volcano Nightmare
programme.desc: Jake, our former Navy SEAL, is ambushed and dumped atop a volcano in Iceland. Facing deadly avalanche fields, boiling mud pits and sulphuric geysers, Jake could lose more than the game when he makes a near-fatal error in the land of fire and ice.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Embrace the Suck

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Green Hell

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Conquering Alaska

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Deadly Inferno

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Poo Pot Maker

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Making Hay the Kilcher Way
programme.desc: Eivin and August build a new hay haler. Charlotte and Otto celebrate their 25th anniversary.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Saved from the Fight

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pack of Puppies
programme.desc: A Harley-loving adopter comes to Villalobos from Michigan. Mariah and Lizzy struggle to catch a stray pit in New Orleans East. When a litter of black pit-mix puppies are dropped off at the Sanctuary, Tia and M2 turn to social media to adopt them out.

programme.desc: A couple in Sioux Falls, South Dakota, wants a larger house for their family. She wants a contemporary house with a kitchen she can make her own, while he wants a home with character and will only tolerate 12 steps or less.

programme.title: House Hunters: More Space for Guitars
programme.desc: A married couple and their two teenage daughters search for a home with more space in the Los Angeles suburbs.

programme.desc: Kathy struggles with the functional issues in the kitchen, living room and master bathroom, and while John has gone so far as to demo the bathroom to make her happy, they haven't been able to agree on a new floor plan.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Design Indecision
programme.desc: Gray loves his family’s home because of the large lot and abundance of privacy, but April is ready to move closer to town and into a home that functions for their family of four.

programme.desc: A homeowner and her son need to start generating income from their lakefront party pad. Using the tranquil surroundings as inspiration, contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni elevate the downtrodden home into a relaxing vacation rental.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Puppy Paradise
programme.desc: Scott McGillivray helps two homeowners whose secluded, lakefront home suffered a flood. With help from designer Debra Salmoni, Scott works to transform their rundown money pit into a pet-cation getaway for animal lovers and their furry family members.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Ski Cottage
programme.desc: After years of neglect, a mountaintop cabin is in desperate need of renovation. Contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni go all in, turning the rustic cottage into a stunning ski chalet ready to start generating vacation rental income.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVI

programme.title: The Simpsons: See Homer Run
programme.desc: Homer's inability to embrace Lisa's Father's Day book the same way he does Bart's Father's Day Toolman causes Lisa to develop DDD (Disappointed Daughter Disorder). In the meantime, Bart causes a huge car pile-up when he steals a street sign.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last of the Red Hat Mamas

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Italian Bob

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Paternity Coot

programme.title: The Simpsons: We're on the Road to D'Ohwhere

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Fair Laddy
programme.desc: The Simpsons take in Groundskeeper Willy after Bart accidentally destroys his house. But soon after his arrival, Willy's poor manners become the focus of a bet between Bart and Lisa, as she takes on the challenge of turning him into a proper gentleman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Seemingly Never-Ending Story

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Has Two Mommies

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson, This Is Your Wife

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kiss Kiss Bang Bangalore

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Time's Up for the Gang

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets New Wheels

programme.desc: A new, cutting-edge archaeological investigation might reveal the long-lost tomb of Attila the Hun, and with the help of the latest science, experts follow newly unearthed leads to a potentially history-changing discovery.

programme.title: Lost Pyramid of the Aztecs
programme.desc: A new investigation brings light to long-lost secrets of the Aztec empire.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: A look inside a mysterious tomb that could reveal secrets of the Kush Empire.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Shattered: End of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1986, Geri Muck searches desperately for her missing daughter, but she has no idea that she's too late. The prosecutor wants justice, the brother wants revenge, but Geri just wants her daughter back.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Bodies in the Bunker
programme.desc: When 16-year-old aspiring film producer Bohdi Potter and her boyfriend go missing, the grave truth behind their disappearance lies deep in the hollow corridors and dark caverns of an old, abandoned military bunker.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Model Predator
programme.desc: When a model scout approaches two high school boys for photos with the lure of cash and a glossy portfolio, they find it hard to resist her advances.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tortured Hero
programme.desc: When a young Army veteran returns from war, his family is relieved to have him out of harm's way finally. But danger lurks closer to home when a brief encounter on a dating app leads to a devastating tragedy.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Is Rodney Reed Innocent?
programme.desc: A Texas woman is brutally raped and murdered, and the trial sparks a racially charged debate over whether an innocent man has been condemned to death. But as new evidence comes to light, it seems her family may never know who killed Stacey Stites.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Crimson End
programme.desc: When two members of a prominent family are murdered in Arkansas, a teenage boy is arrested and pleads guilty. For 24 years one woman believes he is innocent - a member of the victims' family. But once released she is confronted with his true nature.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tortured Hero
programme.desc: When a young Army veteran returns from war, his family is relieved to have him out of harm's way finally. But danger lurks closer to home when a brief encounter on a dating app leads to a devastating tragedy.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Is Rodney Reed Innocent?
programme.desc: A Texas woman is brutally raped and murdered, and the trial sparks a racially charged debate over whether an innocent man has been condemned to death. But as new evidence comes to light, it seems her family may never know who killed Stacey Stites.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When three women from three different decades meet their death or go missing under mysterious circumstances, authorities are forced to examine the one thing they had in common: they all fell in love with the same man.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Death of an Internet Star
programme.desc: When a young fashion designer and mother of three becomes a YouTube star with her online sewing tutorials, the money starts rolling in. But her obsessive and violent ex-boyfriend isn't prepared to let her rise to the top without him in her life.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Home Improvement
programme.desc: When a female professional suddenly vanishes, her family and friends are baffled. Two weeks later, a body is discovered along a highway in another county. It carries subtle clues that could lead Detective Garry McFadden right to the killer's door.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Murder Becomes Personal
programme.desc: A case becomes personal for Charlotte, North Carolina Homicide Detective Garry McFadden when a friend becomes a murder victim. It gets doubly personal when the killer also turns out to be someone close to him.

programme.title: Redrum: Fall from Grace
programme.desc: Fred Butner is an up-and-coming attorney and activist in the Key West, Florida area who is found dead after falling from the tallest building in town.

programme.title: Redrum: Fatal Fortune
programme.desc: Cab driver Pam Carter was found suffocated to death in her Reno apartment.

programme.title: Redrum: Twisted Ties
programme.desc: When truck driver James Kelly is shot to death, it's easy to point the finger at a vengeful member of his family. But police soon realize that their suspect is covering up for someone, and find themselves untangling a web of bribery and betrayal.

programme.title: Redrum: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Chris Vaughn and his family are driving to a water park when their lives are tragically ended in a roadside shooting. Chris is wounded but survives. As investigators unravel the truth, they find that not everyone in this family was a happy camper.

programme.title: Real Detective: Every Rose Has a Thorn
programme.desc: A missing person case turns suspicious when a well-liked Wausau, WI man doesn't show up for work one morning. Investigator Larry Woebbeking finds himself in an unexpected predicament, when the girlfriend of the victim appears to have fallen for him.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: The Yellow House on Kent Street
programme.desc: Officers find a body slumped behind the wheel of a wrecked SUV. But the driver wasn't killed in the crash he was shot in the abdomen. When Demery connects the case to a pair of alarmingly similar murders, he realizes there's a serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: The Man Behind the Mosque
programme.desc: When a nameless corpse turns up steps from a local mosque, a community is left shaken. To solve the case, Demery must untangle a web of lies and misdirection. But as detectives close in on the killer, they stumble upon yet another unsolved crime.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lizzie Borden Took an Axe
programme.desc: '48 Hours' takes a fresh look at a very cold case; a double homicide that captured the attention of the nation in 1892, when Lizzie Borden was acquitted of killing her father and stepmother with a hatchet.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Criss-Cross Killer
programme.desc: When Veronica Bozza's body is found bleeding on her living room floor, it sends shockwaves through the close-knit community of Bridgewater. The murder plot leads Nashville's finest to uncover a bizarre unexpected twist right out of a Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: Identical twins Yvette and Doris Gay are a close-knit pair, but when they meet Renwick Gibbs, their quiet duo transforms into a dangerous threesome. And soon they with devise a murderous scheme that will change one innocent family's life forever.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: The suburbs of Detroit provide a comfortable backdrop for locals to build a life. One family though is quickly headed for disaster when affairs, lies, and explosive arguments lead someone to an early grave.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Betting on Murder
programme.desc: Gail and Stephen Dews have it all: a happy marriage, a beautiful house and healthy children. But a family tragedy and a gambling addiction rips their lives to shreds, proving that nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A couple reaches a standstill during demolition, so David and Michelle come to the rescue to save their remodel.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Halfway House
programme.desc: Michelle and David are challenged to fix a previous remodel that has left half of a home stuck in the 1980s.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Hawaiian Shirt Renovation
programme.desc: Daniel, Kahina and their new baby live in a charming house built in 1931, but the miniscule master closet is being overrun by Daniel's Hawaiian shirt collection.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: A Touch of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple with an unfinished basement apartment that they would like to rent out, call in David and Michelle Jaime to finish off the work. The siblings bring in natural wood tones and durable kitchen finishes, adding their signature Hawaiian touch.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: David and Michelle Jaime take on a whale of a remodel, updating the kitchen, living room and master suite in a home that has been in their client's family for generations.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: House on a Hill
programme.desc: A young family calls on David and Michelle Jaime to update their home that was built in the 1950s. The interior and exterior project involves opening up the floor plan of the kitchen and living room.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Third-Generation Renovation
programme.desc: David and Michelle Jaime take on Kimo and Jodie's third-generation house, which was built by Jodie's grandparents in the 1950s.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: In Over Their Head
programme.desc: A couple that gets in way over their heads with a DIY renovation call in David and Michelle Jaime to help tackle the job.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Breezeblock Build
programme.desc: A family that has lived all over the world hires David and Michelle Jaime to make their home feel truly Hawaiian.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Backyard Build
programme.desc: David and Michelle Jaime have big plans to take a bland backyard and make it the ultimate hangout for kids and adults.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Good Eats: Honey I Shrunk the Cake
programme.desc: Alton Brown prepares a chiffon cupcake.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics III: Creole in a Bowl
programme.desc: Alton looks at the cultures that influenced New Orleans beans and rice.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Curious Case of Curry
programme.desc: Alton discusses how curry was an English dish, which made India famous.

programme.title: Good Eats: Rich Little Poor Boy
programme.desc: One of America's most storied sandwiches gets a historic rethink and a technical do-over, from the oysters to the bread and everything in between. Alton Brown also makes an argument for shucking.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Louisville, KY, which boasts one of the most eclectic food scenes in the country. He digs in to Southern favorites with an Asian twist, fried chicken served with a fiery sauce and comfort food for the modern era.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Memphis
programme.desc: Andrew visits Memphis and makes stops at some of the city's most beloved barbecue joints. Then, he drops by one of America's most iconic soul food restaurants and visits a joint where Italian and Southern comfort food are combined.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Street Foods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the street food being fried, skewered or sandwiched around the world, from smoked sausages in Chicago and fish tacos in Baja, Mexico, to pani-puri in India and chimney cakes in Budapest.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Backyard Cookout
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro reveals the secrets behind heat-and-eat barbecue from Farm Rich Smokehouse, the super yellow color of French's Mustard and the sweet-sour punch of Mt. Olive Bread and Butter Pickles.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends
programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: The Kitchen of Good and Evil
programme.desc: Michael McKean separates the good from the bad on some downright wicked food tales. He uncovers whether beer's spirits were put there by witches, if the pretzel is pious or if its story is full of twists.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Eat Your Words
programme.desc: Michael McKean minces words to get to the bottom of some famous food phrases. He finds out if the extra muffin a baker's dozen could save a baker's life, what's really so cool about cucumbers and if you can literally butter someone up.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Up in the Air
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking our favorite foods up and away. He discovers if there's a scientific reason you may not love airline food.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: State Fare
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a road trip around the US to uncover the stories behind our favorite state plates, including what baked Alaska has to do with Alaska, who put the Big Apple in New York cheesecake.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Carnie Knowledge
programme.desc: Michael McKean juggles carnival classics with stories that will amaze and astound. His big top tales include whether cotton candy is at the root of a cavity conspiracy, if popcorn kernels saved the silver screen.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Opposites Attract
programme.desc: Join host Michael McKean as he figures out why some classic culinary combos are a match made in heaven.

programme.title: Good Eats: Give Peas a Chance
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals all the tasty secrets behind peas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Kinda Blue (Blueberry)

programme.title: Good Eats: Bean Stalker
programme.desc: Alton reinvents the classic green bean casserole just in time to save the holidays.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dillicious

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Big Jon Big Trouble/ Min's Quest
programme.desc: Jon gets overwhelmed when he tries to tame a dinosaur himself. Then, Min learns about perseverance when she helps a mother brontosaurus.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Pondweed/ Owlette Comes Clean
programme.desc: Gekko's powers increase by power pondweed during an underwater mission. While trying to stop Luna Girl, Owlette breaks an observatory's telescope lens and blames her nemesis.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Gekko Floats/ Catboy's Two Wheeled Wonder
programme.desc: Romeo uses his newest device to make the PJ Masks and their HQ float away. When Romeo steals the PJ Masks’ super vehicles, they have to use their bicycles to stop him.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Featherwand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: The Heelers take a trip to Hammerbarn. Bingo has an idea for a new game. By waving her featherwand she can make objects impossibly heavy. Dad eats Bingo's last chip.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: A Good Case of the Hiccups / Stuck Up
programme.desc: Emmie's toy microphone starts to skip and repeat so Doc diagnoses her with 'Repeatitis'. Doc cleans the sand out of toy tractor Riggo so he can move his scooper up and down again.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: The Scrapiest Dragon/ Going for Broke
programme.desc: During a ping pong match with Hallie, Stuffy scrapes his belly on the ground. Later, Awesome Guy is focused more on winning than his safety when he decides to compete in every event of the McStuffins Toyathalon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: National Bob Day/ 7th Inning Fetch
programme.desc: Bob and the pugs head to the Baseball Hall of Fame. Bingo and Rolly throw a National Bob Day to make Bob feel special.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library! / ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Bluey: Dunny/ Duck Cake/ Handstand
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake. Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Viral/ Brothers of Dagarack
programme.desc: After Brittany and the girls release a video that goes viral, Alvin, Simon, and Theodore try to top it. Simon falls ill and asks Alvin and Theodore not to go see a new movie without him, but Alvin just can't resist.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Overlooked/ Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Against Simon's wishes, Alvin borrows his latest invention, an invisibility suit, only to get the zipper stuck. When Theodore wishes on a shooting star, the Chipmunks try to learn what the wish is so they can make it come true.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Jeanette's Secret Garden/ Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead.When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croner's basement, the Chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: He Said She Said/ Attack of the Zombies
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany give wildly differing versions of why the fire alarm went off at the school. Convinced a zombie invasion is imminent, Alvin and Theodore attempt to protect their loved ones.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A New Squid in Town/ Wish Fixers
programme.desc: Mark Chang has to be protected from a forced wedding; Timmy's on a bad wishmaking streak.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: You Doo/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Timmy gets his hands on 'YouDoo' dolls; Timmy wishes for all food on Earth to be desserts.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: The Loud House: For Bros About to Rock/ It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Butterfly Effect/ The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fandom Pains/ Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Write Stuff/ Racing Hearts
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-books way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over. When Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods, they discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward/ Spongehenge
programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: It's Pony: Nosy Pony/ Beatrice
programme.desc: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger. When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony than she is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Selling Out/ Funny Pants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells his restaurant to a big company, but he soon finds retirement boring.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Student Starfish/ Clams
programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: How to Train Your Carl/ Stress Test
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Trend Game/ This Bird Has Flown
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Croaked!/ New Haunts
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog. Then, when Ronnie Anne forgoes a family Halloween tradition for a 'cool' party, she learns 'cool' doesn't always mean 'fun'.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Coupon/ Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it. Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goodbye, Krabby Patty?
programme.desc: Squidward must make Patrick and SpongeBob friends again after they learn that sponges and sea stars aren't ususally friends.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Summer Camp/ Blabber Mouth
programme.desc: The Chipmunks help an owner fix up his run-down summer camp and his broken relationship with his brother. Alvin is convinced that Theodore has cursed him to never lie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Wacky Wednesday/ The Chipmunk and the Catfish
programme.desc: When one of Simon's inventions malfunctions, Jeanette and Alvin switch places. Theodore creates a fake alias online and pretends to be a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Time Flies/ Prank Calls
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back. A prank call by Alvin gets out of hand when the person on the other end of the line vows to track him down.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Karate Kidder/ Playing Favorites

programme.desc: When Mika tries too hard to win Man’s Nest Employee of The Month, she creates a monster that could ruin the telethon Danger Force is hosting.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog. Then, when Ronnie Anne forgoes a family Halloween tradition for a 'cool' party, she learns 'cool' doesn't always mean 'fun'.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Long Tongue Day / Doggy Da Vinci
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween/ Face Your Fear
programme.desc: When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs; when Vanessa asks him to babysit her pet bat, Doof has to overcome his lifelong fear of bats.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.desc: Detective Stabler must interrogate a murderer and a rapist.

programme.desc: The holiday cheer is interrupted when Santa's entrance into a Christmas Village via a zip line goes horribly wrong.

programme.desc: After an ISIS-inspired attack against a member of the US Armed Services, the FBI asks for Captain Raydor's help in finding a terrorist as Major Crimes joins the Bureau in a race against the clock before the terrorist can strike again.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Skin Deep
programme.desc: When Flynn looks into purchasing a new home and seeks input from Provenza and Buzz, an unexpected turn of events leads to a new investigation for Major Crimes. Meanwhile, Buzz continues to look into the circumstances surrounding his father's murder.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cashed Out
programme.desc: Det. Julio Sanchez's application to become a foster parent is jeopardized by his reactions to a particularly gruesome murder after the Major Crimes Division finds a chopped up body burned to bits in the barbecue pit of an L.A. Park.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: When a pair of British tourists get attacked during a Venice Beach robbery, L.A.'s twenty billion dollar tourist industry is threatened by an English journalist riding their tragedy to a career high.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Moral Hazard
programme.desc: After a shootout in a tow yard leaves three people dead, Major Crimes must scramble to find a disturbed man with a bag full of guns and a long list of grievances before he kills again. Meanwhile, Rusty goes against LAPD policy while looking for evidence.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: Model Tara Lambert gets a hitman to kill her husband's ex and put her in a woodchipper, unaware that cameras were rolling.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Point of No Return
programme.desc: As hundreds of dolphins lead the Summer Bay into an approaching cyclone, Jake attempts a daring nighttime rescue in high seas. Scott Campbell Jr. finds himself out of options, leaving Sig to make a controversial call to save the fishery.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Time Machine
programme.desc: Driving the Time Bandit and Cornelia Marie, Josh and Casey attempt Johnathan's strategy for tracking King Crab across time and space. On the Summer Bay, Wild Bill's crew fights a mid-gale power outage, but the days are numbered for their greenhorn.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Force Majeure
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: The Summer Bay suffers damage after a typhoon while Sig gambles it all in one spot. Casey tries a new approach to finding Bairdi Crab and the Time Bandit rushes to get back on track.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Restricted Zone
programme.desc: Johnathan and Sig partner to hunt the elusive Bairdi hoard at the edge of the Restricted Zone. Jake earns an unexpected windfall of King Crab quota, but extended fishing and mechanical failures put safety at risk just as the Coast Guard boards the Saga.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Coast Guard Heroes
programme.desc: A USCG swimmer, pilot and captain, along with Sig, Keith, Bill, Casey, Jake and Sean give an insider's look at the scariest Bering Sea rescues. Many lives are saved and sadly, a few aren't.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Duane Ollinger believes there's a fortune of gold buried beneath his property in Utah, Blind Frog Ranch. But even though the land seems to be fighting him at every turn, he's not going to stop until he gets his hands on the gold, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Submerged Treasure
programme.desc: With an access tunnel to the underground cavern finally opened, and a tantalizing clue discovered, Duane's son Chad takes a risky dive into the flooded cave system, and what he finds defies all explanation.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Mormon Gold
programme.desc: Duane decides that the flooded cave is too dangerous to dive into again, forcing the team to explore new access points to the underground cavern system. But something lurking in the darkness forces everyone to reevaluate their safety.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Someone Was Here
programme.desc: While searching unexplored areas of the ranch for an alternate entrance to the cavern system, the team discovers mysterious ancient markings on a cliffside and a mining shaft dug deep into the mountain that could lead them right to the gold.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Trespassers
programme.desc: Duane employs ground-penetrating radar to scan the land near a potential drill site, leading to a mysterious finding. Trespassers prompt Charlie to increase security on the ranch with a camera system, capturing a frightening sight in the dead of night.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Answers
programme.desc: As winter closes in and the digging season nears its end, Duane takes a final shot at getting into the underground cavern, but uncovers a whole new mystery about the land he owns.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Rust Belt
programme.desc: A complex of tall, windowless buildings in the American Rust Belt hold the secrets to a lost empire of industry and wealth; experts investigate these mysterious structures to reveal why this once powerful metropolis is now home to abandoned ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Cursed Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a historic Scottish castle is now a bewitching wilderness of hidden dangers with deadly booby traps obscured afoot; experts and historians reveal a bygone Second World War military hospital with bizarre ties to an infamous Nazi occupant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind

programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Breakfast Foods Episode

programme.title: Modern Family: Flip Flop
programme.desc: Phil is pretty confident in his ability to sell Claire and Cam's flipped house, but when it proves to be a little harder than he thought, he recruits the whole family into taking some desperate, borderline crazy measures.

programme.title: Modern Family: My Hero

programme.title: Modern Family: Games People Play

programme.title: Chopped: Hot Doggin'

programme.title: Chopped: Cocktail Party

programme.desc: Molly Yeh is hosting book club on the farm. She makes walnut-crusted brie mac and cheese, succulent skillet pork chops with salsa verde, squash and apple salad with mustardy dressing and, for dessert, Dakota-style plum cakes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Dim Sum Date Night
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes adorable bites of scrumptiousness for a dim sum date night. The menu includes steak buns with creamy peanut sauce, crispy veggie buns, addictive shrimp toasts and egg custard tarts for dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Lighter 16-Minute Meals

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Waste Not, Want Not

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fire and Feast
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes perfect pork tenderloin with a delicious herby mustard cream, mac and cheese primavera, and the perfect side, roasted spring veggies and dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Mom Knows Best

programme.desc: Dave and Jenny help a couple update their century-old farmhouse so that it better accommodates large family gatherings. Their main goal is to improve flow and add modern amenities without stripping the home of its unique country character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: An Old Rancher Gets a Chef-Inspired Facelift
programme.desc: Two restaurant owners live in the house her grandfather built, but it's too old-fashioned for their taste and two active boys. When they call on Dave and Jenny to update their outdated ranch, the results are inspiring, modern and ready for entertaining.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: She Said 'Yes!'
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple recently purchased their first property, but the outdated and closed-off interior doesn't fit their needs. Dave and Jenny expand the floor plan, overhaul the kitchen and transform the backyard to create an entertaining hot spot.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: A Contemporary Cleanup
programme.desc: After his semi-hoarder house in a prime location sat on the market for months, it's getting handed over to the reluctant sisters. Lyndsay and Leslie transform problems into possibilities as they give this lackluster split level a contemporary facelift.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Historic Home Rescue
programme.desc: An overwhelmed woman needs Lyndsay and Leslie's help after her mother's home has sat on the market for months. Restoring the 1906 home to its original charm becomes their passion project as they expose its classic character with a cozy-chic cottage feel.

programme.title: House Hunters: Lake Dreams in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple is tired of cramped apartment life and looks to find a place in his hometown of Lake Geneva, Wisconsin. They're looking for a house with three bedrooms, and he wants a place that's on the lake, but she prefers a larger home away from the water.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Easy Transition Versus the German Experience
programme.desc: A Texas military family uproots for a job in Kaiserslautern, and while Mom pines for a romantic German home, Dad can't see past the need for efficiency. The family is left at odds over what's more important: an easy transition or the local experience.

programme.title: House Hunters: Out of the Basement in Atlanta
programme.desc: An engaged couple looks to get out of her mom's basement and into their first home in Atlanta. She's looking for a turnkey high-rise in the city with great views, but he prefers a larger place further out and doesn't mind renovations to stay under budget.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Brink of a Wedding in Bangkok
programme.desc: After years in a long-distance relationship, an engaged couple finally decides to start their life together in Bangkok. They're looking for a home with more space than her current condo, but finding a bigger place within their budget will be a challenge.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Nest Egg Reno

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Sibling Split Level
programme.desc: Contractor Jeff's sister and brother-in-law want to move into their forever home, but they need to get their split level off the market. With a generous sibling discount and some creativity, Leslie and Lyndsay turn the home into a French country cottage.

programme.title: Inside Out: Honeymoon Home
programme.desc: Carmine and Mike try balancing the budget for their newlywed clients who spent their honeymoon money on a fixer upper. Several issues place the project in jeopardy as they figure out whose part of the budget will pay for the problems.

programme.title: Inside Out: Flecking Awesome
programme.desc: Budgets are tested while renovating a former bachelor pad for newlywed clients. Carmine and Mike balance costs to redesign the entire interior and create a dreamy backyard, but construction issues leave them pointing fingers at who will pay for repairs.

programme.title: Inside Out: Garage Mullet
programme.desc: Mike pitches his grandest idea ever to a client looking to convert their garage into a primary bedroom. When he and Carmine struggle to balance the budget on this unique extension, it's Mike who has to put in the sweat equity to keep his vision alive.

programme.title: Inside Out: Restored with the Garage Doors
programme.desc: Carmine and Mike's skills are tested when big-ticket items take away from the budget for renovating a Spanish-style home in Leimert Park. The duo must get creative by restoring vintage pieces around the house to finish the project.

programme.title: Inside Out: Up in Flames
programme.desc: Multiple issues with a renovation cause Carmine and Mike to pull from each other's budget. When they struggle to keep the project from going up in flames after finding an issue with the owner's fireplace, the guys must get creative to complete the job.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Supersized Food
programme.desc: The US has become the culture of 'big' as seen in homes, appliances, and cars. But 'big' has also affected the way Americans eat. Explore America's growing obsession with plus-sized meals.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Snack Sized: The Classic
programme.desc: Learn the story behind the most iconic soft drink in the world and the lengths its creators took to stay on top.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Snack Sized: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Learn the story of the most successful pizza chain on the planet, including the innovations that helped introduce pizza to the nation.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Snack Sized: The Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Learn how a simple dairy farm went on to become one of the world's most iconic candy companies.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Snack Sized: Breaking Breakfast
programme.desc: The most iconic cereal brand in the world began with an accidental discovery at a sanitarium and went on to change breakfast forever.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Snack Sized: Making the Hut

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Snack Sized: Dog Eat Dog
programme.desc: Learn how one ambitious man in Coney Island built an empire and turned the hot dog into a national sensation.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Chinese War Sword
programme.desc: Four smiths must not only free their tools from a steel grate but forge a knife from it. After intense testing, only two will head home in order to recreate a Chinese War Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Army
programme.desc: Bladesmiths from each branch of the US military compete to represent their branch in a battle for $50,000. In round one four members of the Army must forge a special forces V-42 stiletto. The two that move on must build a US Army Officer's Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Air Force
programme.desc: In round two, four airmen from the US Air Force attempt to forge a Bolo knife, combining high carbon steel and helicopter parts, using the San Mai technique. The two who move on must forge a weapon that represents their branch: the Air Force NCO Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Marines
programme.desc: In round three, four Marines attempt to forge the KA-BAR, having to adapt and overcome metals from a massive anchor, using the San Mai technique. The two who move on must forge a weapon that represents their branch: the Marine Corps Officers Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Navy
programme.desc: In round four, four Marines attempt to forge a Naval Mark 3 Dive Knife out of metal from a giant anchor chain. The two who move on must forge a weapon that represents their branch: the Naval Officer's Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Branch Battle: Finals
programme.desc: In the final round, the winning soldier, airman, marine and sailor return for the ultimate showdown. Two persevere and head home to create a legendary sword: General George Washington's lion-headed Cuttoe.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Michael Ivezic and Demitry Papasotiriou
programme.desc: When a respected Toronto bookkeeper is found murdered inside his home, the search for his killer focuses on two unexpected suspects and unearths shocking allegations of sex, scandal, and a deadly betrayal.

programme.desc: An Amish community is turned upside down when a young wife and mother is found murdered inside her home, leading police to look deeper within the community, and exposing a secret romance that triggered a deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Death in a Small Town
programme.desc: An 80-year-old woman is found in her home lying in a pool of blood. Her death is ruled an accident but her family suspects foul play. In a tightknit community where neighbors look out for each other, who would want to hurt a beloved grandmother?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: A decorated war hero is found in his home, the victim of an apparent drug overdose. Investigators uncover a twisted story of fraud and betrayal that leads to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: Lockup: Maricopa County Extended Stay: Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: It's a female housing unit with a reputation, one that inmates call 'a party' and a 'big sorority house' with a twist. But G Dorm at Maricopa County Jail in Phoenix, Arizona is about to turn one new inmate's life upside down.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland Extended Stay: To PC or Not to PC

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico Extended Stay: Pros and Cons
programme.desc: Although inmates in Level 6, the maximum-security facility at the Penitentiary of New Mexico, are granted some perks, like non-contact visits up to twice a week, it's not uncommon for inmates to land longer sentences in prison because of bad behaviour.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: The Confession
programme.desc: A senior inmate takes up rap; a gang member poses a threat, and another inmate makes the most shocking confession ever heard on 'Lockup.'

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes a rural Nebraska town when their beloved high school volleyball coach dies in a fiery car accident. But as investigators reconstruct her tragic death, the resulting clues steer the investigation to reveal a horrifying series of events.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Vanished with the Tides

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Bill and Sandra Inman

programme.desc: A pregnant woman's unexplained disappearance casts suspicion on a mysterious couple who recently entered her life.

programme.desc: When a beloved neighbor perishes in a suspicious fire the resulting investigation exposes a deadly conspiracy and two unlikely suspects.

programme.desc: A beloved police officer's murder will take years for his brothers in blue to solve, ultimately revealing a conspiracy born out of lust and greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Patrick Frazee and Krystal Kenney

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wettest Stories Ever Told
programme.desc: When the Simpsons' plans for a family outing at the Frying Dutchman turn into a dining disaster, they try to salvage the night by telling different stories of disasters at sea. Lisa recounts the Mayflower voyage, and Bart tells tales of Tahitian mutiny.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girls Just Want to Have Sums
programme.desc: Springfield is in an uproar after Principal Skinner makes a sexist comment at the end of an Itchy and Scratchy musical. Principal Skinner is replaced by Melanie Upfoot, a women's education expert, who divides the school into two different schools.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Regarding Margie
programme.desc: After a spring-cleaning frenzy and inhaling too many fumes, Marge suffers from retrograde amnesia. In an effort to bring back her memory, Homer takes her around town to re-familiarize her with her surroundings.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Monkey Suit
programme.desc: After visiting an evolution exhibit, Flanders pushes Mayor Quimby to appoint Reverend Lovejoy as a "Morality Czar"' in charge of spreading the theory of creationism. Darwin's theories are outlawed and Lisa is the only supporter of the theory.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge and Homer Turn a Couple Play
programme.desc: After a passionate kiss between Marge and Homer airs on the Isotope Jumbotron, struggling second baseman Buck Mitchell turns to the couple for marital advice. The Simpsons are able to get Buck and his sexy singing wife, Fiona, on track.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Mook, the Chef, the Wife and Her Homer
programme.desc: After Lisa befriends Fat Tony's son Michael, Fat Tony invites the Simpsons over for dinner as a sign of gratitude. Shockingly, Fat Tony is shot by a rival family moments after Michael admits he would rather be a chef than take over the family business.

programme.title: Family Guy: Follow the Money
programme.desc: After Chris gets a special one-dollar bill for his birthday and quickly loses it, the dollar gets passed from character to character throughout Quahog.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pal Stewie
programme.desc: To Stewie's surprise, he quickly befriends a boy his age, but is devastated when he realizes he isn't invited to his birthday party. Meanwhile, Peter and Lois attend a self-empowerment seminar.

programme.title: Family Guy: Throw It Away
programme.desc: After Lois reads a new book on the joys of decluttering, she challenges the rest of the Griffins to throw anything out of the house that does not spark joy. While all starts out well, Lois soon takes the decluttering to a surprising extreme.

programme.title: Family Guy: Rich Old Stewie
programme.desc: Stewie's future life could not be going any better, living as a wealthy, old Mr. Burns-type man, until his retirement is interrupted by Brian, who brings news that Peter is dying.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Live and Let Fly
