programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower
programme.desc: Archaeologists are finding hard proof of the prehistoric civilization that once thrived in the Amazon, and with the help of cutting-edge technology, these new discoveries reveal how these long-lost people built an advanced society in the hostile jungle.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts are hot on the trail of the perpetrators that caused this civilization to fall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Greatest Pharaohs
programme.desc: The vast necropolis of the Valley of the Queens and the calamitous burial of King Tutankhamun contain lingering, ancient mysteries; experts using cutting-edge forensic archaeology to reveal enigmatic secrets behind Egypt's greatest pharaohs.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Salem Witches
programme.desc: The Salem witch trials created mass hysteria and resulted in the judicial execution of 20 innocent people. Many believe that Salem, MA, remains haunted, with some using modern witchcraft to appease vengeful spirits and lift this legendary curse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Salem Witches
programme.desc: The Salem witch trials created mass hysteria and resulted in the judicial execution of 20 innocent people. Many believe that Salem, MA, remains haunted, with some using modern witchcraft to appease vengeful spirits and lift this legendary curse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Valley of Egypt's Queens
programme.desc: The Valley of the Queens is a vast necropolis concealing some of Egypt's most miraculous tombs and powerful women; now, investigators use cutting-edge tech to explore lost tunnels and uncover the enigmatic secrets behind these ancient pharaohs.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Message
programme.desc: Take a look at what might really happen if we got a message from space. Scientists and sci-fi writers, with cooperation from SETI and Carl Sagan's son, Nick, unravel the impact of this world changing event.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Arrival
programme.desc: Take a look at how humans may react when an alien spacecraft makes its way to Earth.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Invasion
programme.desc: A swarm of small spacecraft depart their huge mother ship, and hover in our atmosphere.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Offspring
programme.desc: A mothership the size of Texas is hovering over Earth and we are tired of waiting. We send a rover to explore, and what we find makes us question the definition of life. On Earth, the pods multiply and get smaller, making contact with them unavoidabe.

programme.title: Alien Planet Earths
programme.desc: The search for Earth's twin is the hottest topic in astronomy. Thanks to NASA's ground-breaking Kepler mission, astronomers believe there are over 20 billion alien worlds with liquid water and therefore the potential for life.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: What to Expect
programme.desc: Aliens exist. Scientists lay out what we can expect them to be like by grappling with difficult questions.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: How to Prepare
programme.desc: Inject a dose of cutting-edge research into an action-packed journey through space, to find out exactly whether aliens might come here, and how to prepare when they arrive.This everything you need to know; it's the definitive guide.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extinction
programme.desc: Asteroids strike, planets collide, black holes blast out death rays, volcanoes erupt and ice engulfs the planet. These are the universe's weapons of extinction. They've happened before - wiping out entire species, and they will happen again.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Five Months of Hell
programme.desc: Chris and Theresa Lockhart seem like a perfectly matched couple. But when one of them vanishes, it leads to five months of hell for everyone and a final, shocking act that reveals all.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Married to the Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife. Kathy winds up overhearing him being shot at, leading her to grapple with the terrifying realities of being married to a cop.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: When a frantic 9-1-1 call reports an infant stopped breathing, Kenda and Walker must see if the daycare is to blame or the parents themselves. Then, Kenda works an execution-style shooting and is shocked to learn the victim is a kindly grandmother.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cynthia
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. When all leads dry up, the case runs cold. But years later, Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: For the Love of Money
programme.desc: An Upstate New York cabby is shot dead in his car, and the entire area is dumbfounded as to who would kill a man known for his great generosity. A rapid-fire investigation leverages technology to uncover a treacherous plot hatched in a salacious affair.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Serial Killer in the Making
programme.desc: Beloved wife and cardiac nurse Lorie Kirkley goes missing from the safety of her own home in what appears to be a burglary gone wrong. When several strange clues are found, the entire small town of Valparaiso, Indiana, comes under suspicion.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Unbrotherly Behavior
programme.desc: David Weedman is everyone's friend in Tell City, Indiana. When he's found dead at home, suspicions of suicide emerge. His family pressures detectives to investigate further and now David's best friends are murder suspects.

programme.title: True Conviction: For the Love of Money
programme.desc: An Upstate New York cabby is shot dead in his car, and the entire area is dumbfounded as to who would kill a man known for his great generosity. A rapid-fire investigation leverages technology to uncover a treacherous plot hatched in a salacious affair.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Serial Killer in the Making
programme.desc: Beloved wife and cardiac nurse Lorie Kirkley goes missing from the safety of her own home in what appears to be a burglary gone wrong. When several strange clues are found, the entire small town of Valparaiso, Indiana, comes under suspicion.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Farmer's Daughter
programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: When a frantic 9-1-1 call reports an infant stopped breathing, Kenda and Walker must see if the daycare is to blame or the parents themselves. Then, Kenda works an execution-style shooting and is shocked to learn the victim is a kindly grandmother.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Cleveland 911 receives call from a panicked woman saying a mysterious man forced his way into her home and shot her boyfriend in front of their kids. Detectives have to untangle a twisted web of jealousy to find out who killed this young father and why.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Under Siege
programme.desc: A woman calls 911, saying her husband is exchanging gunfire with intruders, and her toddler is outside with them. Police find the boy safe, though the husband is dead.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Sex, Lies and Audiotape
programme.desc: A mom accused of the murder of a stranger must clear her name by secretly-recording a confession from the man she claims is framing her. Sordid revelations of a secret life lead police to prove the guilt of an obsessive, cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: She Had Everything
programme.desc: The bullet-riddled body of 19-year old college student Amanda Anderson is found by her younger brother, Nate. Detectives interview friends and neighbors, however, it's a microscopic discovery by the forensics team that leads to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: End of the Line
programme.desc: When a first-year college co-ed turns up raped and murdered, it takes a freshman cop to beat the odds and catch a killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Housebound Homicide
programme.desc: Police take 10 years to track down the killer of a disabled Denver woman and establish if she was killed for her money or if there was a more personal motive.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Everyone Knows Her Name
programme.desc: After the shocking death of Heather Maples, the student community of Murfreesboro, Tennessee confronts the sobering truth that a killer is lurking among them. Detectives unlock her cell phone to find a web potential suspects and her last steps.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Terror in the Pines
programme.desc: He was the most wanted man in America, a triple murderer on the run with nothing to lose and chilling confession letter threatening cops. When he meets a single mom who falls for his charms, time will tell if he can keep the secret.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Left to Die
programme.desc: Toddler Cooper Harris dies after being left in a hot car. His father says it was an accident. Authorities say it was murder. What secrets was the father keeping? The grieving mother who stunned a courtroom speaks out about what happened to her baby boy.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Pack Mentality
programme.desc: A single mother gets along with her handyman neighbor, until she gets a new man in her life and he becomes the owner of over fifty dogs. Accusations become threats, threats become attacks, and eventually the conflict comes to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Evil In the House of the Lord
programme.desc: In Nashville, a fire engulfs a local church. Once the flames are out, firefighters find a charred body, and it looks like it's the church pastor, Rev. David Terry. The body has been dismembered and beheaded. The last man to see Terry alive is missing.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Through a Child's Eyes
programme.desc: In 1982, 35-year-old JoAnn Tate was stabbed to death in her home in St Louis. Her kids Melissa, 7, and Renee, 4, nearly died. JoAnn's diary revealed a man Melissa ID'd as the attacker. Years later, new memories emerged that changed everyone's lives.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Revenge With a Bullet
programme.desc: After motorists spot a man's body burning on the side of the highway, investigators find evidence of a brutal assassination and fiery cover-up. Detectives decode construction debris with curious details to reveal a scheme that ended in murder.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Mafia's Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: What happened when the FBI pursued the five families who ran organised crime in New York, and the fate of two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Spanish Colonial Ranch Revival
programme.desc: Brett takes on a Spanish Colonial Revival that has had all of the beautiful original woodwork covered over with layers of paint. It's painstaking work to bring it back and the team hits some serious snags.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch
programme.desc: Brett opens up the floor plan of a 1950s mid-century ranch and makes the space more livable for a family of four while staying true to the original style.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Restored: 1920s Spanish Eclectic
programme.desc: A couple find a cute 1920s Spanish eclectic home in which they want to update the kitchen, add an ensuite bathroom and dressing room to the master, and plant a drought-tolerant garden, all staying in Spanish style.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: One-of-a-Kind Rigs
programme.desc: Roger meets Josh Pollack, owner of Rosenberg's Bagels & Delicatessen in Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Sizzling Steaks
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets Tom Perini at his restaurant, Perini Ranch Steakhouse in Buffalo Gap.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime BBQ
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.desc: Ali Khan is taking in the mountain views in Asheville, N.C., as he looks for the best local deals.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Greenville Goodness
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Greenville, S.C.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Filling Up In Florida
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts the day strong with a Chopped champion's hearty French crepe with an American twist and then keeps things rolling at a Brooklyn-style deli.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Hungry In The Jax
programme.desc: Ali Khan is hunting for the best deals in Jacksonville, Fla., for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He kicks off his culinary escapades with a chef-driven dish of chorizo corn cakes with vegan queso and spicy guajillo chile sauce.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Rome
programme.desc: Tony dines on mouth-watering classic Italian dishes and attempts to embody the mindset of the Roman people.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Calabria
programme.desc: Andrew showcases Calabria, a rugged region in the toe of Italy's boot. The area sees a diverse range of ingredients that shine in signature dishes like fileja noodles with goat and parmigiana di melanzane.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Munich
programme.desc: As the proud capital of Bavaria and beer-drinking, Munich has built a cuisine around hearty dishes meant to stick to the bones. From schnitzel and spätzle to knöedel and cake, Andrew Zimmern reveals Munich's festival of foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Zurich
programme.desc: Andrew takes us to Zurich, the origin of some of Switzerland's most famous foods. From warm gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate made with a modern twist, this city is home to some of the most indulgent comfort foods in the world.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Fit for a King
programme.desc: Eddie tries over the top dishes kit for a king.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bay Area

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Seattle
programme.desc: In Seattle, the crab cakes are so good it's an obsession, and you can find a seriously good slice of pizza at Serious Pie.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory

programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roughin' It/ The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Lincoln is worried that he's lost his manliness from growing up with all sisters, so he and Clyde go camping. Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but when he starts to ask favors of her, Lori gets in hot water.

programme.title: The Loud House: Study Muffin/ Homespun
programme.desc: The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: The Loud House: Attention Deficit/ Out on a Limo
programme.desc: Clyde's dads give Lincoln more attention than he gets at home. Lincoln wins a ride in a limo and starts to change after soaking up the good life.

programme.title: The Loud House: Ruthless People/ What Wood Lincoln Do?
programme.desc: When the house is infested with termites, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others with Aunt Ruth.Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: The Loud House: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: Lincoln fears he's predictable, so vows to change up his routine. Then, Lori gets the yips when she learns the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House: Crimes of Fashion/ Scales of Justice
programme.desc: When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde take on the case.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Coupon/ Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it. Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Back to the Past / The Bad Guy Club for Villains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. The pair enjoy a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Mama Drama/ Ballet Boys
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Oh Brother Where Art Thou/ The Wall
programme.desc: Alvin thinks he's losing his mind when Simon goes missing and no one else even remembers who Simon is. When the girls at school cast votes for the cutest chipmunk on the bathroom wall, Alvin worries about the results.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Gift/ Theo Knows Best
programme.desc: Theodore gives Dave an ugly handmade vest for his birthday and insists he wear it to an upcoming business meeting. When Theodore finds a winning lottery ticket, everyone has their own ideas on how the money should be spent.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simsky/ Lucky Day
programme.desc: Simon is alarmed to discover he's been tagging private property in his sleep. Alvin's luck goes from bad to worse after Theodore finds a four-leaf clover and everything starts going his way.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Birthday Wish/ Go Young, West Man
programme.desc: Adam West never had a 'normal' childhood; Timmy loans his godparents to Tootie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Timmy's 2D House of Horror/ It's a Wishful Life
programme.desc: A lava flow threatens Vicky's house; Timmy wishes he was never born.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Back to the Norm/ Teeth for Two
programme.desc: Crocker and a genie share a mortal enemy; Jorgen tries to pull Timmy's tooth out.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Talkin' Trash/ Timmy TV
programme.desc: Cosmo's magic trash bags invite disaster; Fairy World is watching Timmy TV.

programme.title: Danger Force: Dynomite
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Chapa's Crush
programme.desc: When Chapa's distraction with a crush causes the Danger Force to fail a mission, the gang bust find her obsession to get her back to her normal self.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Grandparent Trap/ Miss Step
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Operation Dad
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city with the help of Sid.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Yard/ Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot.

programme.title: The Loud House: Funny Business/ Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant, but starts hogging the spotlight. The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo vs. Evil
programme.desc: Leo follows Marcus to his secret lair to gather evidence that proves he’s bionic but ends up captured by Marcus.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: With Douglas now revealed as Marcus' master, the two infiltrate Davenport's lab and capture Davenport with plans on using him to lure Bree, Chase, and Adam.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: Now alone, except for Eddy, Leo must figure out how to rescue Davenport and the Lab Rats. Eddy shares with Leo Davenport's secret room in the lab where all of his most powerful inventions are stored.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Follow Your Memes
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Moving Situation
programme.desc: Chance and Herman learn that their father is up for a big promotion, and they might have to move to a different city if he gets the job.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: CSI: Aaron Burr
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Takeover
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Crank It Up
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 2: Escape From Reality
programme.desc: Dipper, Soos, and Wendy must save Mabel from a strange new world, while Bill's forces plan their next move.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What Do It Do?/ Atlantis
programme.desc: Candace thinks she finally has a strange device to show Mom and bust Phineas and Ferb when Agent P knocks Dr. Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' into the boys' front yard. Phineas and Ferb then reconstruct the device to find out what it does.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Picture This/ Nerdy Dancin'
programme.desc: The boys build a transport device so that they can retrieve Ferb's skateboard from England. Candice asks Jeremy to be her dance partner in a dance show, but Jeremy can't dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Date Night/ The Room
programme.desc: Bill chaperones Cricket and Gabriella's first date. Then, Tilly closes up Cricket's secret escape hole in their room, sparking a conflict that leads them to splitting the room down the middle.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Bleeped/ Sellouts
programme.desc: Cricket is amused by a new socially unacceptable word in his big city world and tempts fate by repeating it. Then, the Greens try new methods to improve sales at their produce stand.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Clean... to the Extreme/ Stand and Delivery
programme.desc: Kick accidentally breaks Gunther's dad's foosball table and must complete a series of favours to replace it before Gunther's dad gets home. Kick takes over the delivery services at Battlesnax and must defend delivery guarantee.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Switching Gears/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Kick's bike is badly damaged hours before the annual BMX Rodeo. The competition gets fierce when Kick decides to ride the Mustang Menace, a supposedly untameable bike. Brad forms a band and takes over the garage, so Kick decides to form his own band.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kickin' Genes/ Clothes Call
programme.desc: When Kick finds out that his mom used to race speedboats, he asks for her help with an upcoming stunt. Kick promises to behave when his Mom drags him on an embarrassing shopping trip to the mall.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Pool Daze/ Live-In Wade
programme.desc: Kick leads his friends in a battle for freedom and fun when the lifeguards at the community pool force them to stay in the kiddie pool.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Sold!/ Faceplant
programme.desc: Kick Buttowski is an extraordinary kid living in the world's most ordinary town.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Stumped Again/ The Kick Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Kick must choose between helping his idol Billy Stumps in a monster truck show and helping his best friend Gunther with an important Viking coming-of-age ritual. Kick teams up with Jackie to take a photo for a billboard contest.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Hand in Hand/ Luigi Vendetta
programme.desc: Kick and Kendall accidentally get their hands stuck together by a rare cave sap and must get un-stuck without being seen. Sick of Brad's bullying, Kick hires someone to 'take care of' Brad.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kick or Treat/ Dead Man's Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Kick vows to trick-or-treat at every house in Mellowbrook, including Mary Van Der Death's creepy mansion. Then, Kick and Gunther find and abandoned amusement park deep in the woods and discover that it may be haunted by Dead Man Dave.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kart to Kart/ Kyle 2.0
programme.desc: When Gordie Gibble buys Mellowbrook's go-kart track, he bans the Buttowskis. Kick spends time with cousin Kyle in order to score tickets to Dirk Bike Mike's Demo-Cross.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: You've Been Brad'd/ Sleepover
programme.desc: After Kick discovers that he is the sole target of Brad's new Internet prank show, he must find a way to avoid his brother and complete an impossible stunt.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Gym Dandy/ Detained
programme.desc: Kick tries out for the school's sports teams, but causes chaos when he has trouble following Coach Sternbeck's rules. Then, Kick must team up with some unlikely allies to bring down the new Vice Principal and escape detention.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Room/ Dude, Where's My Wade?
programme.desc: When Kick's room is destroyed, Dad grounds Kick and makes him move into Brad's room where he must abide by his older brother's ridiculous rules. Kick and Gunther follow clues to track down Wade when he goes missing before the safety inspector's visit.

programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Taboo

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Web

programme.title: The Middle: Taking Back the House
programme.desc: After years of being at their kids' beck-and-call and never having time for themselves, Frankie and Mike decide to take charge of their lives and regain control of their household. Axl, Sue and Brick don't plan on going down without a fight.

programme.title: The Middle: The Big Chill
programme.desc: Mike freezes Frankie out because he can't fathom how she inadvertently paid $200 for a small bottle of eye cream that she thought was priced at $20. Meanwhile, Axl's fathering techniques are put to the test.

programme.title: Reba: Sweet Child O'Mine
programme.desc: Barbra Jean panics a pregnant Cheyenne by remarking that her baby may turn out to be a mini-Kyra. Reba decides its time she told Cheyenne that she was the mean sister, not Kyra.

programme.title: Reba: Locked and Loaded
programme.desc: Kyra has been secretly taping Van and posting the video on YouTube.com for the entire world to see and mock. Reba advises Brock to make a grand romantic gesture to save his marriage to Barbra Jean.

programme.title: Reba: As We Forgive Those...
programme.desc: Barbra Jean convinces a reluctant Reba to coax the truth out of Kelly. Barbra Jean suspects that Kelly was brought in by management to be her successor. Meanwhile, Cheyenne and Van break some bad news to Brock.

programme.title: Reba: Bullets Over Brock
programme.desc: Reba learns that Brock has been secretly living in the garage for several days so he can spend time apart from Barbra Jean, who thinks he is on a business trip. Brock confesses that he doesn't know how to mend things with his wife.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium Isn't Free

programme.title: South Park: Unfulfilled

programme.title: South Park: Bike Parade
programme.desc: The boys' chance of winning the Bike Parade is in jeopardy when Kenny quits.

programme.title: South Park: Going Native

programme.title: South Park: Margaritaville

programme.title: South Park: Crippled Summer

programme.title: South Park: Pee

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp

programme.desc: The doctors of Grey Sloan Memorial are hit with a barrage of spooky patients, which affects their own plans and puts one doctor's well-being in jeopardy. Meanwhile, Derek collaborates with Ben on a new surgical technique.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Two Against One

programme.desc: The murder of a man under FBI surveillance puts the federal agents in hot water with the L.A.P.D.

programme.title: The Closer: Road Block
programme.desc: The Major Crimes Division investigates the hit-and-run murder of a young girl on a bike.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Off the Wagon
programme.desc: Andy and Mike delve into the mysterious overdose of a young Hollywood star and the trail of emotional destruction he left in his wake. Meanwhile, Rusty finally comes to a conclusion about how to handle the pregnancy of his biological mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Family Law
programme.desc: When a jogger takes a nasty fall down the steps of L.A.'s storied Greek Theatre, Major Crimes finds itself investigating a divorce attorney with a lot of angry clients, and Lt. Tao goes undercover in the world of college age hookers.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dead Zone
programme.desc: While investigating a murder that has personal implications for Sanchez, the squad uncovers a much larger criminal operation. Meanwhile, Buzz comes face to face with someone that may have been present at his father's murder.

programme.title: Major Crimes: White Lies
programme.desc: In attempting to clear up lose ends from their investigation of a gang of White Supremacists, Major Crimes detectives audit the trial of serial killer Dwight Darnell, and end up facing their most deadly case ever.

programme.title: Major Crimes: White Lies

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Bombs and Betrayal
programme.desc: Tucson, Arizona society is blown away when a car bomb explodes outside of an exclusive country club, but when the case goes cold, will investigators be able to find their suspect?

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Cashed Out
programme.desc: When a mother of six is viciously slain in her Sarasota home, police wonder if her wealthy ex-husband might have been involved in the crime?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Innocence and the Intern
programme.desc: An elderly white widow is brutally murdered in Greenwood, S.C., and Edward Lee Elmore, an African American handyman, is quickly found guilty and sentenced to death. A tenacious legal intern comes across the case and tries to save him.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Boy's Story
programme.desc: A money order salesman is brutally murdered and two teenage brothers and their best friend are arrested. They spend almost four decades behind bars, until a journalist takes notice of the case and uncovers evidence of the men’s innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own
programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: City of Gold
programme.desc: Josh treks the stone-paved Inca Trail, ascending 20,000 feet through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of the undiscovered City of Gold. His road to riches takes a detour to the legendary ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Holy Land Mystery
programme.desc: Josh Gates uses cutting-edge technology in the Holy Land to restore Dead Sea Scroll fragments with the archeologist who found them.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Jordanian Treasures
programme.desc: Josh Gates follows new leads to the Jordanian desert in search of an ancient treasure after finding riddles etched into the Dead Sea Scrolls.

programme.title: Expedition X: Into the Alien Ocean
programme.desc: Jess and Phil's investigation into the phenomenon of unidentified submerged objects off the coast of Catalina Island intensifies after the discovery of an extraterrestrial underwater base between the island and the mainland.

programme.title: Curse of Akakor: The Missing Explorers
programme.desc: A team of investigators travels to the Amazon to search for three missing explorers who disappeared while looking for the lost city of Akakor. Their search uncovers disturbing rumors of murder.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Jordanian Treasures
programme.desc: Josh Gates follows new leads to the Jordanian desert in search of an ancient treasure after finding riddles etched into the Dead Sea Scrolls.

programme.title: Expedition X: Into the Alien Ocean
programme.desc: Jess and Phil's investigation into the phenomenon of unidentified submerged objects off the coast of Catalina Island intensifies after the discovery of an extraterrestrial underwater base between the island and the mainland.

programme.title: Curse of Akakor: The Missing Explorers
programme.desc: A team of investigators travels to the Amazon to search for three missing explorers who disappeared while looking for the lost city of Akakor. Their search uncovers disturbing rumors of murder.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets at the Palace
programme.desc: We reveal the centuries-old secrets and mysteries of one of the most remarkable examples of Victorian engineering. Follow the cutting-edge technology that built the Palace of Westminster, and find how it paved the way for today's skyscrapers.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mayan City of Blood
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, the lost city of Chichen Itza contains ancient secrets of a mysterious civilization. Follow the scientists working to find how the city of Chichen Itza was built, and how the bloody rite of human sacrifice shaped the city.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Great Wall
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is the biggest man-made structure on the planet and one of its biggest mysteries. Follow the scientific mission to reveal the ancient secrets of one of history's greatest empires.

programme.title: Unearthed: House of Holy Relics
programme.desc: A medieval engineering marvel might be the home to the remains of the Bible's Three Magi, and we follow the scientists and experts who are delving deep into the mysteries of this incredible religious site.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Summit of the Gods
programme.desc: Go inside the Acropolis, an ancient engineering marvel that has stood above the city of Athens for thousands of years. Follow the scientists working to reveal its hidden mysteries: how it was built, what it looked like, and why it's still standing today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Viking City of the Dead
programme.desc: When a mysterious Viking fortress lost underground for over a thousand years is discovered, experts investigate its buried treasures to reveal what caused the end of this fearsome civilization.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Statue of Liberty: The New Secrets
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty is one of the most iconic sights in the world, yet there are still secrets to be found and mysteries to be solved. Historians, archaeologists and engineers embark on a quest to unravel the inspiration behind her curious design.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Stone Age
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets and ritual of the people who build the world's largest stone circle.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramids of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals. New discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: According to legend, the ancient Roman city of Hierapolis hides a secret portal to the underworld beneath its streets.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Marty attempts a treacherous trip across a frozen river, in an effort to bring heat to the new cabin. Misty and Maciah build a pump house to secure the family's new water source on the Upper 20.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Krystal's Journey
programme.desc: Krystal began overeating to shield herself with a protective layer of obesity after suffering years of abuse. Once a means of protection, her pathological eating now threatens to destroy her life if she doesn't get help.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Vianey and Allen's Story
programme.desc: Weighing over 600 lbs. each, Vianey and Allen are locked in a codependent relationship based on a shared love of food. As they head to Houston, they will soon find out if their relationship can handle the strain of growing healthy together.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less
programme.desc: Taylore is a beautiful, young woman with unsightly elf-like bumps on her ears. Jose never goes out because of the baseball-sized lump on his head. Ken is covered in painful bumps that make it difficult to do everyday things.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: Save My Skin: Skin Tag, You're It!
programme.desc: Craig's lumps might be caused by something serious, Rosie's lipoma is growing between muscles, Carys' psoriasis is spreading quickly, and Karen hopes Dr. Emma can help with her moles and skin tags.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Skewered Skydivers
programme.desc: After being impaled by the same fence post, two skydivers are rushed to the ER. Dr. Jasper tries to determine why multiple people that were at the same club have stopped breathing. A woman risks missing her wedding day when her finger gets stuck in a jar.

programme.desc: In Flavortown, chefs usually have free reign of the entire market – but tonight, that's all changing when Guy has the chefs cooking meals all night long… but can only shop each aisle ONCE.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy Cooks the Games: Salute the Troops
programme.desc: Hunter Fieri puts his dad, Guy, through Triple G boot camp when a few guests drop in to pay the Fieris a visit and play along with action-packed Salute the Troops games. In round one, Guy chooses a teammate to make an American comfort classic with him.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Wicked Aisle Games
programme.desc: A flip of a coin determines whether the chefs can shop the odd or even aisles while making their sandwich and side. In the final round the chefs must make their steakhouse dinner using one ingredient per aisle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: One-Time Aisle Games
programme.desc: In Flavortown, chefs usually have free reign of the entire market – but tonight, that's all changing when Guy has the chefs cooking meals all night long… but can only shop each aisle ONCE.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Star Budget
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four superstar chefs to duke it out in a budget battle. These culinary celebrities get hit with budget after budget, in battle after battle, testing their skill of making a dollar stretch all competition long.

programme.title: Big Time Bake: Roaring '20s
programme.desc: Four bakers go back in time as they create cookies, cupcakes and a showpiece cake straight out of the 1920s. When the party's over, Buddy Valastro, Dan Langan and Kristen Tomlan will send the best baker on an all-expenses-paid vacation.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Say Hello To The Flavors Of Spring
programme.desc: Valerie prepares a meal of spring delights for her husband and friends.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Food! Friends! Fun!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli has her pals Kevin and Kristen, who are fierce card competitors, over for a long weekend visit. Wanting to spend some real quality time with them, Valerie is prepping all of her comfort foods in advance.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bayou Bash Brunch
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites Louisiana native and actress Faith Ford over for a brunch that makes them feel like they're in the Big Easy. Valerie makes green tomato Benedict and easy cajun hollandaise, olive salad, hurricane mimosas and bananas foster.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Starry Movie Night
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is hosting an outdoor movie night with her son and his girlfriend, and she makes some food for them to enjoy, including an onion ring wedge salad with homemade ranch dressing and movie theater bark for dessert.

programme.title: Chopped: I'm Your Huckleberry
programme.desc: In the first round four competitors try to make octopus and huckleberry into dishes that will make them stand out as Chopped Champ material. Then in a high-energy second round, champagne corks and hammers go flying.

programme.title: Chopped: Just for the Halibut
programme.desc: The chefs must create delicioius appetizers using smoked beef tongue and garbanzo beans.

programme.title: Chopped: All-Burger Meal!
programme.desc: The chefs learn that they will be making hamburgers, in some shape or form for all rounds.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Best of the Worst: Choux Ready for This?
programme.desc: The teams of recruits compete in boot camp's first 'Tour de Petit Four,' riding scooters around a French-themed obstacle course and collecting ingredients to create elaborate dessert platters. Then the chefs teach them how to make French eclairs.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Chef Adrianne Calvo is bringing her Miami heat as she goes head-to-head with German native and top Pennsylvania chef Ben Thomas.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's a Date
programme.desc: Things get shrewd when Iron Chef's Alex Guarnaschelli and Alton Brown join forces. It's up to partners in business and in life, chefs Lisa Carlson and Carrie Summer, to outsmart the one and only Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Humble Beginnings

programme.desc: We explore the mysteries and legends surrounding seven spine tingling sites. Gathering a team of ghost hunters, psychic mediums and historians we reveal why these paranormal hotspots deserve their reputation as the most terrifying places in America.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Dark Encounters
programme.desc: Dine with ghosts then party with the paranormal at a haunted nightclub. Head underground in Portland where unsuspecting folks were held captive and then hit up a haunted mansion and tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Deadly Destinations
programme.desc: In this instalment of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we visit the deepest, darkest, haunted spots our country has to offer. We explore a bar in Chicago that contains forces so dark it causes visitors to turn horribly violent.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Hot Spots
programme.desc: In this hour of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we're touring more of the spookiest spots in the country! We visit a defunct amusement park that delivers a unique 'thrill', and a residence so haunted the owner rarely sleeps there!

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: History of Horror
programme.desc: In this hour, continue the search for places that'll make you scream. Stop by an old prison where ghosts of the country's worst violent offenders roam, and a Chicago home that inspired the legend of the Devil Baby.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Tour of Fright
programme.desc: Visit an Illinois cemetery and a theater in Cincinnati that was built over a mass grave.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Devil's Playground
programme.desc: From a Nevada motel centered around clowns and haunted by a 1911 tragedy to a Maine movie theater where the horror lurks in the aisles and not on the screen, we explore scary attractions across the nation.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Cursed Towns
programme.desc: From a Vermont bridge where a jilted teenage girl leaped to her death, to a Tennessee intersection that was a the site of a deadly shoot out, we venture into towns across America haunted by the transgressions of the past.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System: The Grand Tour
programme.desc: From the raging inferno of the Sun to the icy beauty of Pluto, experts investigate the secrets that have lingered in the solar system for billions of years in cutting-edge missions to infinity and beyond.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Gravitational Waves Revealed
programme.desc: Gravitational waves are helping scientists explore the cosmos in revolutionary, new ways, and the discoveries they make are revealing the universe's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets
programme.desc: Explorers tackle the mysteries of life itself leading us to worlds never before seen.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Gravitational Waves Revealed

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets
